name: Larios-Cardenas 2022 Tadalafil Obesity Hemodynamics Extract
methods: Randomized double-blind placebo-controlled acute trial evaluating a single tadalafil 20 mg dose on flow-mediated dilation, blood pressure, augmentation index, central systolic blood pressure, and brachial-ankle pulse wave velocity.
population_profile: Adults with grade 1 obesity and elevated cardiometabolic risk; indirect for mostly healthy men age 30 to 50.
indication_context: Experimental acute vascular-physiology study in obesity.
safety_findings: Abstract does not provide detailed adverse-event data; single-dose hemodynamic lowering should be interpreted with safety-interaction caveats.
directness_to_target_population: Moderate for acute tadalafil exposure, low for long-term healthy-user cardiovascular health because participants had grade 1 obesity and endpoints were acute surrogate markers.
confounding_and_bias_limits: Single-dose study, surrogate markers, obesity population, and no long-term clinical outcomes.
class_transfer_limits: Direct tadalafil evidence; transfer limit is acute single-dose exposure and obesity-specific vascular physiology.
